summary: Well-structured TypeScript + Bun solution with proper error handling and type safety. Workflow uses correct action pinning (v4), least-privilege permissions, and job dependencies. Minor issue: Bun installation (lines 19-22 and 40-43) is duplicated verbatim across two jobs—should be extracted to a composite action. CLI handles stdin/stdout correctly; matrix.ts logic is sound with explicit validation. Slight inefficiency: generate-matrix step reads matrix.json twice via `bun -e` (lines 60-61) instead of piping. No dead code or speculative generality. Include-merge logic handles multiple matching combos clearly per comments. Solid shipping quality with minor polish opportunities.
